text.title: test-mutation-feedback-loop Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for test-mutation-feedback-loop as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Lowering the break threshold whenever a PR fails it.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The threshold ratchet is the gate; relaxing it on red converts mutation testing into theatre.

failure-mode.description: Marking every surviving mutant as equivalent without justification to make CI green.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Equivalent-mutant claims must be auditable; an unreviewed equivalent.md is the same escape hatch as a coverage waiver.
